name: Data Table
description: Sortable, filterable, paginated data table with row selection

standard.description: Full-featured table with column headers, sortable columns, row selection checkboxes, pagination footer

slots.toolbar: Top row with optional search Input and action Buttons
slots.table-body: Data rows with optional row selection Checkbox
slots.pagination: Footer with page info and prev/next Buttons

compact.description: Denser rows, no selection, simpler pagination (prev/next only)

visual_brief: Full-width data table with a sticky header row. Header cells use uppercase, small, muted text with sort-direction arrows on sortable columns. Data rows have consistent vertical padding (py3) for scan-ability, with subtle zebra-stripe background on hover. Row-selection checkboxes align in the first column. Active selections highlight the row with a faint primary-color tint. A toolbar above the table holds a search input on the left and action buttons (export, delete) on the right. Pagination controls at the bottom show current range, total count, and prev/next buttons with disabled states at boundaries.

responsive.mobile: Table transforms into a stacked card list. Each row becomes a vertical card with label-value pairs. Toolbar search goes full-width. Pagination simplifies to prev/next only. Horizontal scroll is avoided entirely.
responsive.tablet: Table displays with horizontal scroll if columns exceed viewport. Sticky first column for row identifiers. Toolbar remains single row.
responsive.desktop: Full table layout with all columns visible. Sticky header on scroll. Toolbar with search, filters, and bulk action buttons. Full pagination with page numbers.

motion.micro: Row hover highlights with 150ms background-color transition. Sort arrow rotates 180deg on direction change with 200ms ease. Checkbox scales briefly on check (scale 1.1 for 100ms).
motion.transitions: Rows entering from filter/search fade in with 200ms opacity transition. Bulk-selected rows highlight with a slide-in left-border accent over 150ms.

accessibility.role: Table uses semantic <table>, <thead>, <tbody>, <th>, <td> elements. Sort buttons are <button> inside <th> with aria-sort attribute.
accessibility.keyboard: Arrow keys navigate cells. Space toggles row selection. Enter activates row action. Tab moves between toolbar, table, and pagination.
accessibility.screen_reader: aria-label on table describes content. aria-sort on sortable headers. Live region announces sort changes and selection count. Pagination uses nav with aria-label.

slots.toolbar: Top row with optional search Input and action Buttons
slots.table-body: Data rows with optional row selection Checkbox
slots.pagination: Footer with page info and prev/next Buttons
